name: Vanilla Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 9-inch square pan with foil extending over the sides of the pan; butter the foil.
2. In a saucepan, combine sugar, margarine, and milk. Bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly.
3. Boil for 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
4. Remove from heat. Add marshmallow cream and white chocolate discs; blend until smooth.
5. Stir in vanilla extract. Pour into the prepared pan.
6. Cool to room temperature.
